version.name: 0.41-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.41-beta :
+ Render Queue: Supports batch rendering of multiple selected items in the list. + Double Click: Added Ctrl/Cmd + Double-click on TCP (Track Control Panel) for smart selection. (Note: Requires rebinding under Mouse Modifiers in Preferences). + Underlying Optimization: Full-link UTF-8 optimization for the Windows platform.
-- Mantrika Team --2026-03.21
